nasb.text: The side chambers surrounding the temple were wider at each successive story. Because the structure surrounding the temple went upward by stages on all sides of the temple, therefore the width of the temple increased as it went higher; and thus one went up from the lowest story to the highest by way of the second story.

esv.text: And it became broader as it wound upward to the side chambers, because the temple was enclosed upward all around the temple. Thus the temple had a broad area upward, and so one went up from the lowest story to the top story through the middle story.

cnv.text: 這些圍繞著殿的廂房越高越寬。殿四圍的內牆一級比一級薄，所以廂房越上越寬；有樓梯從下層經過中層上到上層。

ccb.text: 这些厢房的设计是阶梯形的；因此，厢房越往上层越宽，有楼梯自下层经过中层到上层。
